description_long: This is a wide, round-bodied ceramic vase with a short, slightly flared neck and a broad, open mouth. The exterior surface is decorated with a faded reddish-brown slip and features a band of white, teardrop-shaped motifs encircling the upper body, interspersed with subtle swirling patterns. The rim is thick and rounded, showing some signs of wear and minor chipping, while the body displays areas of discoloration and surface abrasion, suggesting age and use. The base is small and slightly recessed, providing stable support for the vessel. The interior appears dark and unglazed, consistent with traditional earthenware construction. This vase evokes a rustic, handcrafted aesthetic, suitable for display in outdoor or heritage-themed urban environments.
description: A round, reddish-brown ceramic vase with a wide mouth, decorated with white teardrop motifs and subtle swirling patterns. The surface shows signs of age and wear, giving it a rustic, handcrafted appearance.
description_view_0: The vase's wide mouth and thick rim are prominent, with the white teardrop motifs and swirling patterns clearly visible on the upper body.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the continuity of the white motifs and reveals more surface wear and discoloration on the lower right side.
description_view_2: The front view shows the full band of white teardrop motifs encircling the vase, with the reddish-brown slip and subtle swirls most visible.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the weathered surface and minor chips near the rim, with the decorative motifs partially faded.
